task:
MuseScore 3 is open with /home/user/Documents/woodwind_switch.mscz — a single Clarinet staff with 4 measures.

Add a mid-score instrument change at the start of measure 3 so the staff switches from Clarinet to Flute from measure 3 onwards. Save in place at /home/user/Documents/woodwind_switch.mscz.

verification.description: Instrument change to Flute at measure 3
